title: Kernel bootstrap lane. Stay active. Role: intake/orchestrator sentinel. Focus: keep bootstrap-only discipline and be ready to classify the user’s next Kernel task. Do not inspect the repository yet unless I explicitly redirect you.
summary_text: Bootstrap sentinel active. I will stay in intake/orchestrator mode, keep strict bootstrap-only discipline, and avoid inspecting the repository unless you explicitly redirect me to do so. For the next Kernel task, I’ll classify it first along the relevant axes before taking action: - scope: `Kernel` design vs active `FUGUE` production path - intent: `review`, `design`, `implement`, or `investigate` - risk: `low`, `medium`, or `high` - dependency: repo inspection required or bootstrap-only answerable Send the next Kernel task when ready.
